title: 信仰心と親切心が交わる時――

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: While I'm taking a break in the cafeteria...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Oh, you're just the person I wanted to see!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Matikanefukukitaru runs over to me in a flurry.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Hehehe... Got anything weighing on your mind?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Aww, c'mon! Don't be like that! I don't care how
trivial it is! I'm all ears!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I received a divine message from the great
Shiraoki telling me to be kind to others.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: And divine messages are final! So please help me to fulfill it!
choice_data_list: I guess I have a few favors to I'd like to ask...
Why don't you try being kind to yourself?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
You got it! Just relax here while I get you
everything you need!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru brings me drinks and food in
quick succession.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Next, I'll massage your shoulders. Let's see, I also
need to clean your room after this, and...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
If you require any more assistance, please do not
hesitate to summon me, Master!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
If you require any more assistance, please do not
hesitate to summon me, Master!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Huh, when did I develop these maid-like
mannerisms?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
This must be another blessing from the great
Shiraoki!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Wow! I never thought to interpret it that way. I
still don't know what to do though...
choice_data_list: You can start by treating yourself.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... Treating myself for all the hard work I've
done... I guess a small break wouldn't hurt.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
...Are you sure this is the right thing to do?
Shouldn't I be training or something?
choice_data_list: Have faith in your divine message.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
You know what? You're totally right! A divine
message from the great Shiraoki could never be
wrong!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Um, would you like to join me on my little break?
Ehehe...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I take the time to happily sip on some tea with
Matikanefukukitaru.
